headline: CME Group Adds Four E-mini Futures for Broad Market Exposure
summary: CME expands its equity index futures lineup with four new E-mini contracts, targeting demand for broad-market exposure and risk management.

raw.headline: CME Group Adds Four E-mini Futures for Broad Market Exposure
raw.summary: CME expands its equity index futures lineup with four new E-mini contracts, targeting demand for broad-market exposure and risk management.

headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

raw.headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
raw.summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.

headline: Wall Street Is Onboarding Cardano — Yet ADA Sits at a 5-Year Low
summary: ADA hit a five-year low this week as CME runs 24/7 Cardano futures and Nasdaq adds it to a new crypto index.
